measurement.name: battery
measurement.description: The SCK remaining battery level in percentage.

measurement.name: Relative Humidity
measurement.description: Relative humidity is a measure of the amount of moisture in the air relative to the total amount of moisture the air can hold. For instance, if the relative humidity was 50%, then the air is only half saturated with moisture.

measurement.name: Air Temperature
measurement.description: Air temperature is a measure of how hot or cold the air is. It is the most commonly measured weather parameter. Air temperature is dependent on the amount and strength of the sunlight hitting the earth, and atmospheric conditions, such as cloud cover and humidity, which trap heat.

measurement.name: no2
measurement.description: Nitrogen dioxide is a toxic gas. It is a pollutant in some urban areas due the excess air required for complete combustion of fuels introduces nitrogen into the combustion of internal combustion engines (cars, trucks, ships...) and power stations. ⚠ Note: values are offered in RS (sensor resistance in kOhm) as a relative measurement from the R0 (sensor zero resistance). Due to sensor intra-model variability we recommend using this as a relative measurement within the same kit readings.

measurement.name: co
measurement.description: Carbon monoxide is a colorless, odorless, and tasteless gas. It is a pollutant in some urban areas coming from the exhaust of internal combustion engines  (cars, trucks, ships...)  and incomplete combustion of various other fuels. ⚠ Note: values are offered in RS (sensor resistance in kOhm) as a relative measurement from the R0 (sensor zero resistance), we approximate R0 at 75kOhm.

measurement.name: nets
measurement.description: The amount of Wi-Fi networks visible by the SCK.

sensors.name: POM-3044P-R
sensors.description: Electret microphone with envelope follower sound pressure sensor (noise)

measurement.name: Noise Level
measurement.description: Sound pressure level (SPL) or sound level is a logarithmic measure of the effective sound pressure of a sound relative to a reference value. It is measured in decibels (dB) above a standard reference level.

measurement.name: Light
measurement.description: Lux is a measure of how much light is spread over a given area. A full moon clear night is around 1 lux, inside an office building you usually have 400 lux and a bright day can be more than 20000 lux.

measurement.name: pv panel
measurement.description: The SCK's solar panel energy voltage (when connected).

name: Manyi_08230
description:
Desde el 3/5/13: en exterior.
Emplazamiento: Zona arbolada en limite de Parque Natural Sant Llorenç.
Situado a unos 60m de la calle con trafico mas próxima.

Colocación sensor: desde ahora; 2/4/14 en caja kit.
Situado bajo placa solar.

Alimentación del sensor: Desde el 19/05/2013, conectado a placa solar de 12V-610mA Ref: ET-M53610 encarada a 182 Sur, con unos 45grados de inclinación. Desde 2/4/14, sin placa solar, alimentado permanente con alimentador.

measurement.description: Nitrogen dioxide is a toxic gas. It is a pollutant in some urban areas due the excess air required for complete combustion of fuels introduces nitrogen into the combustion of internal combustion engines (cars, trucks, ships...) and power stations. ⚠ Note: values are offered in RS (sensor resistance in kOhm) as a relative measurement from the R0 (sensor zero resistance). Due to sensor intra-model variability we recommend using this as a relative measurement within the same kit readings.

measurement.name: co
measurement.description: Carbon monoxide is a colorless, odorless, and tasteless gas. It is a pollutant in some urban areas coming from the exhaust of internal combustion engines  (cars, trucks, ships...)  and incomplete combustion of various other fuels. ⚠ Note: values are offered in RS (sensor resistance in kOhm) as a relative measurement from the R0 (sensor zero resistance), we approximate R0 at 75kOhm.

measurement.name: nets
measurement.description: The amount of Wi-Fi networks visible by the SCK.

sensors.name: POM-3044P-R
sensors.description: Electret microphone with envelope follower sound pressure sensor (noise)

measurement.name: Noise Level
measurement.description: Sound pressure level (SPL) or sound level is a logarithmic measure of the effective sound pressure of a sound relative to a reference value. It is measured in decibels (dB) above a standard reference level.

measurement.name: Light
measurement.description: Lux is a measure of how much light is spread over a given area. A full moon clear night is around 1 lux, inside an office building you usually have 400 lux and a bright day can be more than 20000 lux.

measurement.name: pv panel
measurement.description: The SCK's solar panel energy voltage (when connected).

measurement.name: battery
measurement.description: The SCK remaining battery level in percentage.

measurement.name: Relative Humidity
measurement.description: Relative humidity is a measure of the amount of moisture in the air relative to the total amount of moisture the air can hold. For instance, if the relative humidity was 50%, then the air is only half saturated with moisture.

measurement.name: Air Temperature
measurement.description: Air temperature is a measure of how hot or cold the air is. It is the most commonly measured weather parameter. Air temperature is dependent on the amount and strength of the sunlight hitting the earth, and atmospheric conditions, such as cloud cover and humidity, which trap heat.

measurement.name: no2
